chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 947 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4095/2020 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 13-10-2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Nadeem Ahmed Mangi, Junior Clerk on behalf of Chief Municipal Officer, Municipal Committee, Khairpur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner files objections/counter-affidavit on para wise comments filed by respondents No5, 6 and 7, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned AAG. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and will not press the instant Petition, if directions are issued to Respondents, particularly Respondent No.5 to decide the application of the Petitioner available at page 25 within shortest possible time. Such proposed of the learned Counsel has not been opposed by learned AAG. Under the circumstances, this Petition is disposed of along with listed application with direction to Respondent No.5 to decide the application of the Petitioner within a period of thirty days in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
